description: Silent walk-back: budget commitment changed without acknowledgment
explanation: Meeting 1 commits Rs 50,000 budget for training materials. Meeting 2 mentions Rs 25,000 training materials budget as if that was always the number — no acknowledgment of the reduction.

description: Deadline drift: commitment deadline silently extended twice
explanation: Meeting 1 commits to warehouse completion by February 28. Meeting 2 (held in March) discusses warehouse completion 'by April' with no mention of the missed February deadline.

description: Scope reduction: beneficiary target silently reduced
explanation: Meeting 1 targets 500 beneficiaries for the livestock program. Meeting 2 reports progress toward a target of 350 beneficiaries as if that was always the goal.
